name: project-tracker
description: Project documentation lifecycle: init tracker docs, learn from them, audit progress, validate health, update on changes, and record architectural decisions

interface.longDescription: Generate, read, audit, validate, update, and extend structured tracker documentation for a codebase.
defaultPrompt: Use the project-tracker-init skill to initialize tracker docs for this repository.
Use the project-tracker-learn skill to learn this project from existing tracker docs.
Use the project-tracker-doctor skill to validate whether tracker docs match the current code.
Use the project-tracker-update skill to update stale tracker docs after code changes.
Use the project-tracker-audit skill to audit progress and find untracked TODOs.
Use the project-tracker-adr skill to record an architectural decision.
